languages.text: "Вот уж вы правы, Ваша Светлость. Именно приказ полковника я и не обсуждаю!"
"You're quite right there, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And it's the colonel's order that I'm not debating!"
languages.original_text: "Вот уж вы правы, Ваша Светлость. Именно приказ полковника я и не обсуждаю!"

traits.locale_text: "You're quite right there, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And it's exactly the Colonel's order that I'm not questioning!"
"You're quite right there, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And it's the colonel's order that I'm not debating!"
"Maybe so. Maybe not. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I have Batoshski's orders and blessing. And he is my supreme commander."
"You're quite right there, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And it's exactly the Colonel's order that I'm not questioning!"
"You're quite right there, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And it's the colonel's order that I'm not debating!"

languages.text: 「そうかもしれません。そうではないかもしれません。貴方様、私はバトシュスキーの命令と祝福を受けています。そして彼は私の最高司令官です」
languages.original_text: "Maybe so. Maybe not. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I have Batoshski's orders and blessing. And he is my supreme commander."

traits.locale_text: 「そうかもしれません。そうではないかもしれません。貴方様、私はバトシュスキーの命令と祝福を受けています。そして彼は私の最高司令官です。」

languages.text: "Bu konuda çok haklısınız {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Albayın emrini sorgulayacak değilim!"
languages.original_text: "You're quite right there, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And it's the colonel's order that I'm not debating!"

traits.locale_text: "Bu konuda çok haklısınız {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Albayın emrini sorgulayacak değilim!"

languages.text: «Efectivamente, mi{mf|lord|lady}. ¡No pienso disputar las órdenes de mi coronel!».
languages.original_text: "You're quite right there, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And it's the colonel's order that I'm not debating!"

traits.locale_text: «Efectivamente, mi{mf|lord|lady}. ¡No pienso disputar las órdenes de mi coronel!».

languages.text: “您说得没错，大人。可我没质疑，我恰恰是在遵守上校的命令！”
languages.original_text: "You're quite right there, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And it's the colonel's order that I'm not debating!"

traits.locale_text: “您说得没错，大人。可我没质疑，我恰恰是在遵守上校的命令！”

languages.text: « Vous avez parfaitement raison, Votre Seigneurie. Et justement, j'obéis à l'ordre du colonel sans discuter ! »
languages.original_text: "You're quite right there, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And it's the colonel's order that I'm not debating!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez parfaitement raison, Votre Seigneurie. Et justement, j'obéis à l'ordre du colonel sans discuter ! »

languages.text: "Da habt Ihr recht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Genau das hat mir der Colonel befohlen!"
languages.original_text: "You're quite right there, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And it's the colonel's order that I'm not debating!"

traits.locale_text: "Da habt Ihr recht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Genau das hat mir der Colonel befohlen!"
